title: Hut 8 Mining Corp (NASDAQ:HUT) Q2 2024 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Hut 8 Mining Corp Q2 2024 Earnings Call: Revenue reached $35.2 million, up 72% year-over-year from $20.5 million. Net loss attributable to Hut 8 was $71.9 million vs. $1.7 million loss in prior year. Adjusted EBITDA loss of $57.5 million vs. income of $14.8 million prior year. Digital asset mining revenue declined to $13.9 million from $15.9 million due to network halving. Gross margin expanded significantly to 46% from 34% year-over-year. Blended costs decreased 40% quarter-over-quarter to $0.032 per kilowatt hour. Cash position: $175.5 million. Bitcoin holdings: 9,102 BTC valued at $570.5 million. Total debt: $328.8 million. Power Layer Expansion: 1.3 gigawatts of total power capacity with 205 MW greenfield site in Texas Panhandle. $150 million convertible note investment from Coatue Management. Cost per Bitcoin mined: $26,232 (7% increase post-halving). Fleet efficiency: 31.7 joules per terahash with next-gen miners at 12 joules per terahash. GPU-as-a-Service vertical launching with 1,000 Nvidia GPUs. 5-year customer agreement with fixed payments. CEO Asher Genoot emphasized operational excellence and bottom line economics.
